meta.poznamky: 4x pismeno T v rade. Start: x=30, y=100, uhel=0 (vpravo). Kazde T: forward(60) pricka, PenUp, backward(30) na stred, right(90) dolu, PenDown, forward(40) svisla, PenUp, backward(40) zpet, left(90) vpravo, forward(50) posun na dalsi T, PenDown. Uhly: right(90) + left(90) x4. Cary: 60 + 40 x4.

cms.task_text: Naprogramujte želvu, aby pomocí [hlp]smyčky opakování nakreslila 4× písmeno T[/hlp] v řadě vedle sebe. Každé T má příčku 60 px a svislou část 40 px.
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r1" x="20" y="20"><value name="TIMES"><block type="math_number" id="m1"><field name="NUM">4</field></block></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="b1"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="b2"><next><block type="turtle_backward" id="b3"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="b4"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="b5"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b6"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="b7"><next><block type="turtle_backward" id="b8"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_left" id="b9"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b10"><field name="DISTANCE">50</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="b11"></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>

testing_js.poznamka: Paste do testing.js pro lokalni otestovani v sandboxu
